title: Video Of Surgical Management Of Hematocolpos
author: Cheikh Mohamed, Chayma
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This 53-second video abstract provides a visual overview of the surgical management of hematocolpos caused by an imperforate hymen in a 13-year-old patient. It illustrates the key steps of the procedure, including the creation of the hymenal opening, drainage of accumulated menstrual blood, and preservation of hymenal integrity. The video emphasizes both the precision of the surgical technique and the cultural considerations involved, offering valuable insights for clinicians and healthcare professionals.
